title: BioNano Genomics Inc (BNGO) Stock Investors Activity & Sentiment
text: Bionano Genomics (BNGO) retail investor sentiment is currently negative, with only 1.8% of TipRanks retail investors changing their holdings in the last 7 days. Technical sentiment indicators show mixed signals with bearish undertones. The Fear & Greed Index is at 39 (Fear), indicating elevated market uncertainty. Technical analysis shows 2 Buy signals, 10 Sell signals, and 5 Neutral signals across various indicators. Despite negative retail sentiment, Wall Street analysts maintain a bullish consensus with overall Strong Buy rating and significant price target upside. The disconnect between retail and analyst sentiment reflects the risk-reward profile of early-stage biotech companies. Recent developments provide some positive catalysts: the Q1 2026 revenue beat analyst expectations ($6.7M vs $7.52M estimate), flow cell unit sales growth, and improving gross margins. Insider activity shows management commitment to the company's strategy.
